---
title: "Province Guessr"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="mongolia-shell province-shell">
  <section class="hero-panel province-hero">
    <div class="hero-copy">
      <p class="eyebrow">Interactive Mongolia Map Game</p>
      <h1>Province Guessr</h1>
      <p class="hero-text">
        Click the correct aimag on the map. Every correct pick grows your streak. A wrong guess
        ends the run and reshuffles all 21 provinces into a fresh sequence.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-chips">
        <span class="chip">21 aimags</span>
        <span class="chip">No repeats in a run</span>
        <span class="chip">3D hover map</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-side">
      <div class="date-badge" id="provinceStatusBadge">Loading province run...</div>
      <a class="fact-link-card" href="index.html">
        <p class="mini-label">All games</p>
        <h2>Back to the launcher.</h2>
        <p class="motif-note">Jump back to the game hub or switch over to Mongolia 100.</p>
      </a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="stats-strip">
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Current streak</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="provinceStreakValue">0</p>
    </article>
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Best streak</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="provinceBestValue">0</p>
    </article>
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Run progress</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="provinceProgressValue">0 / 21</p>
    </article>
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Remaining</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="provinceRemainingValue">21</p>
    </article>
  </section>

  <section class="province-grid">
    <article class="province-panel">
      <div class="question-meta">
        <span class="meta-pill">Target province</span>
        <span class="meta-pill subtle" id="provinceIndexPill">Pick 1 of 21</span>
      </div>
      <h2 id="provincePrompt">Loading aimag...</h2>
      <p class="question-lead" id="provinceLead">
        Hover a province to raise it from the map, then click the area you think matches the prompt.
      </p>
      <div class="map-shell">
        <div class="map-frame" id="provinceMapFrame">
          <div class="map-loading" id="provinceMapLoading">Drawing Mongolia...</div>
          <svg id="provinceMap" class="province-map" viewBox="0 0 900 640" aria-label="Mongolia province map"></svg>
          <div class="feedback-panel province-popup" id="provinceFeedbackPanel" hidden>
            <p class="feedback-result" id="provinceFeedbackResult"></p>
            <p class="feedback-fact" id="provinceFeedbackText"></p>
            <button class="primary-button" id="provinceContinueButton" type="button">Next province</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel-actions">
        <button class="ghost-button" id="provinceRestartButton" type="button">Restart run</button>
      </div>
    </article>

    <aside class="info-panel">
      <h3>How it works</h3>
      <ul class="rules-list">
        <li>Each run shuffles all 21 aimags into a random order.</li>
        <li>The same province never appears twice in a run.</li>
        <li>A wrong click ends the streak and starts a new 21-province order.</li>
        <li>The map stays interactive, with hover lift and feedback coloring.</li>
        <li>Clear all 21 to finish the run and start a new one.</li>
      </ul>
      <div class="mini-panel">
        <p class="mini-label">Current run</p>
        <p id="provinceRunSummary">Preparing the province sequence...</p>
      </div>
    </aside>
  </section>
</div>

<dialog id="provinceWinnerDialog" class="winner-dialog">
  <div class="winner-content">
    <p class="eyebrow">Map Cleared</p>
    <h2>You found all 21 aimags.</h2>
    <p id="provinceWinnerMessage">Restart to get a fresh province order.</p>
    <div class="winner-actions">
      <button class="primary-button" id="provinceWinnerRestartButton" type="button">Play another run</button>
      <a class="ghost-button" href="index.html">All games</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</dialog>

<script src="province-guessr.js"></script>
```
